---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to SDF
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What's missing or frustrating today?

## Proposed solution

How would you solve it? Describe the behavior you'd like.

## Phase affected

Which SDF phase(s) would this change?

- [ ] sdf-setup
- [ ] Quick Track
- [ ] Discovery
- [ ] Spec
- [ ] Build
- [ ] Verify
- [ ] Document
- [ ] General / routing

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about?

## Additional context

Any examples, references, or context that helps understand the request.
